requirement_topic.en: EMC Conformity — ISIRI / INSO National Standards
requirement_topic.zh: EMC合规 — ISIRI / INSO国家标准
requirement_topic.zht: EMC合規 — ISIRI / INSO國家標準

summary.en: Wireless and electronic devices sold in Iran must demonstrate electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) conformity to applicable INSO (Iran National Standard Organization) standards published by ISIRI (Institute of Standards and Industrial Research of Iran). Iranian INSO standards for EMC are technically derived from CISPR publications (e.g., CISPR 32 for multimedia equipment emissions, CISPR 35 for immunity) and IEC 61000 series. Compliance evidence — typically test reports from an accredited laboratory — must accompany the CRA type approval application. Iran does not accept CE-marked EMC test reports or ETSI EN series reports as a direct substitute, though the underlying technical test data may be referenced in the application process subject to CRA/ISIRI acceptance.
summary.zh: 在伊朗销售的无线及电子设备须证明符合ISIRI（伊朗标准与工业研究院）发布的适用INSO（伊朗国家标准化组织）电磁兼容（EMC）标准。伊朗EMC领域INSO标准在技术上源自CISPR出版物（如多媒体设备发射的CISPR 32、抗扰度的CISPR 35）及IEC 61000系列。合规证明（通常为经认可实验室的测试报告）须随CRA型号认证申请一并提交。伊朗不接受CE标志的EMC测试报告或ETSI EN系列报告作为直接替代，但底层技术测试数据可在经CRA/ISIRI接受的情况下在申请过程中被参考。
summary.zht: 在伊朗銷售的無線及電子設備須證明符合ISIRI（伊朗標準與工業研究院）發布的適用INSO（伊朗國家標準化組織）電磁相容（EMC）標準。伊朗EMC領域INSO標準在技術上源自CISPR出版物（如多媒體設備發射的CISPR 32、抗擾度的CISPR 35）及IEC 61000系列。合規證明（通常為經認可實驗室的測試報告）須隨CRA型號認證申請一並提交。伊朗不接受CE標誌的EMC測試報告或ETSI EN系列報告作為直接替代，但底層技術測試數據可在經CRA/ISIRI接受的情況下在申請過程中被參考。

standards_or_laws: INSO standards derived from CISPR 32 (emissions — multimedia equipment)
INSO standards derived from CISPR 35 (immunity — multimedia equipment)
ISIRI — Institute of Standards and Industrial Research of Iran (standard-setting body)

summary.en: In China, EMC for information technology and telecom equipment is governed primarily by GB 9254 (emissions, aligned to CISPR 32) and GB/T 17625 series (harmonics and flicker, derived from IEC 61000-3-x). CCC certification for relevant product categories requires EMC testing to these GB standards. SRRC radio type approval testing also covers in-band and spurious emission limits.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和电信设备的EMC主要由GB 9254（发射，对标CISPR 32）和GB/T 17625系列（谐波和闪烁，源自IEC 61000-3-x）规范。相关产品类别的CCC认证须按上述GB标准进行EMC测试。SRRC无线电型号认证测试还涵盖带内及杂散发射限值。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術和電信設備的EMC主要由GB 9254（發射，對標CISPR 32）和GB/T 17625系列（諧波和閃爍，源自IEC 61000-3-x）規範。相關產品類別的CCC認證須按上述GB標準進行EMC測試。SRRC無線電型號認證測試還涵蓋帶內及雜散發射限值。

gap.en: China's GB 9254 and GB/T 17625 are technically close to the CISPR/IEC framework that INSO standards reference, so underlying test data may partially overlap. However, CCC EMC certificates and GB-based test reports are not directly accepted by ISIRI or CRA. A separate INSO-compliant test report from an accredited laboratory, submitted as part of the CRA type approval dossier, is required. Verify with CRA whether Chinese-lab test data to CISPR limits can be referenced in lieu of repeat testing.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254和GB/T 17625与INSO标准所参照的CISPR/IEC框架在技术上较为接近，因此底层测试数据可能部分重叠。但CCC EMC证书和基于GB的测试报告不被ISIRI或CRA直接接受。须向CRA提交符合INSO标准的独立测试报告，作为CRA型号认证申请材料的一部分。建议向CRA核实是否可引用中国实验室按CISPR限值出具的测试数据以替代重复测试。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254和GB/T 17625與INSO標準所參照的CISPR/IEC框架在技術上較為接近，因此底層測試數據可能部分重疊。但CCC EMC證書和基於GB的測試報告不被ISIRI或CRA直接接受。須向CRA提交符合INSO標準的獨立測試報告，作為CRA型號認證申請材料的一部分。建議向CRA核實是否可引用中國實驗室按CISPR限值出具的測試數據以替代重複測試。

source.publisher: ISIRI — Institute of Standards and Industrial Research of Iran

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity to INSO national standards (derived from CISPR/IEC) is required as part of the CRA type approval process in Iran. CCC EMC certificates and CE-based EMC reports are not accepted substitutes. Test reports must be submitted through the CRA type approval dossier via a registered Iranian importer or agent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合INSO国家标准（源自CISPR/IEC）的EMC合规是伊朗CRA型号认证流程的必要组成部分。CCC EMC证书和基于CE的EMC报告不可作为替代。测试报告须通过注册伊朗进口商或代理随CRA型号认证材料一并提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合INSO國家標準（源自CISPR/IEC）的EMC合規是伊朗CRA型號認證流程的必要組成部分。CCC EMC證書和基於CE的EMC報告不可作為替代。測試報告須透過已登記的伊朗進口商或代理隨CRA型號認證材料一並提交。

requirement_topic.zh: 波斯语/法尔西语标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: 波斯語/法爾西語標籤要求

summary.en: Iran mandates Persian (Farsi) language labelling on all electronic and wireless devices sold in the country, under consumer protection and product standards regulations enforced by ISIRI. Required label information includes: product name, model number, technical specifications (frequency band, power, voltage/current ratings), country of manufacture, Iranian importer name and address, INSO/ISIRI conformity markings where applicable, and relevant safety warnings — all in Persian script. Packaging and user documentation must also be in Persian. Compliance with labelling requirements is typically verified by customs authorities on import and by ISIRI market surveillance.
summary.zh: 伊朗根据ISIRI执行的消费者保护和产品标准法规，要求在该国销售的所有电子及无线设备采用波斯语（法尔西语）标签。必要标签信息包括：产品名称、型号、技术规格（频段、功率、电压/电流额定值）、制造国、伊朗进口商名称及地址、适用的INSO/ISIRI合规标志，以及相关安全警告 — 均须使用波斯文字。包装和用户文档也须为波斯语。标签合规情况通常由海关当局在进口时及ISIRI市场监管时核查。
summary.zht: 伊朗根據ISIRI執行的消費者保護和產品標準法規，要求在該國銷售的所有電子及無線設備採用波斯語（法爾西語）標籤。必要標籤信息包括：產品名稱、型號、技術規格（頻段、功率、電壓/電流額定值）、製造國、伊朗進口商名稱及地址、適用的INSO/ISIRI合規標誌，以及相關安全警告 — 均須使用波斯文字。包裝和用戶文檔也須為波斯語。標籤合規情況通常由海關當局在進口時及ISIRI市場監管時核查。

standards_or_laws: ISIRI labelling standards for electronic and telecom products
Iran Customs regulations (product labelling at import)

summary.en: China requires Chinese-language labelling on products sold domestically, including mandatory Chinese labelling under CCC certification requirements and general consumer protection law. Export products from China are not required to carry Persian/Farsi labelling — that obligation arises only in the destination market.
summary.zh: 中国要求在国内销售的产品使用中文标签，包括CCC认证要求及普通消费者保护法下的强制性中文标签。中国出口产品无需附带波斯语/法尔西语标签 — 该义务仅在目的市场产生。
summary.zht: 中國要求在國內銷售的產品使用中文標籤，包括CCC認證要求及普通消費者保護法下的強制性中文標籤。中國出口產品無需附帶波斯語/法爾西語標籤 — 該義務僅在目的市場產生。

standards_or_laws: China Consumer Protection Law (mandatory Chinese labelling)
CCC certification labelling requirements (GB 4343 / related standards)
General customs declaration requirements for export

gap.en: Chinese product labels and documentation are in Chinese (Mandarin); Iran requires Persian/Farsi script. This is an additional localisation task for every product model. The Iranian authorized importer typically manages Persian labelling and documentation preparation, but the exporter must supply accurate technical data for translation. Missing or incorrect Persian labelling is a common cause of customs hold or market withdrawal in Iran.
gap.zh: 中国产品标签和文档为中文（普通话）；伊朗要求波斯语文字。这是每个产品型号需额外进行的本地化工作。伊朗授权进口商通常负责波斯语标签和文档准备，但出口商须提供准确的技术数据以供翻译。波斯语标签缺失或有误是伊朗海关扣留或市场下架的常见原因。
gap.zht: 中國產品標籤和文檔為中文（普通話）；伊朗要求波斯語文字。這是每個產品型號需額外進行的本地化工作。伊朗授權進口商通常負責波斯語標籤和文檔準備，但出口商須提供準確的技術數據以供翻譯。波斯語標籤缺失或有誤是伊朗海關扣留或市場下架的常見原因。

source.publisher: ISIRI — Institute of Standards and Industrial Research of Iran

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Persian/Farsi labelling is mandatory for all wireless and electronic products sold in Iran. Chinese-language labels do not satisfy this requirement. The Iranian authorized importer or agent is typically responsible for preparing compliant Persian labels; exporters must supply accurate technical specifications for translation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 波斯语/法尔西语标签对所有在伊朗销售的无线及电子产品为强制要求。中文标签不满足该要求。伊朗授权进口商或代理通常负责准备符合规定的波斯语标签；出口商须提供准确的技术规格以供翻译。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 波斯語/法爾西語標籤對所有在伊朗銷售的無線及電子產品為強制要求。中文標籤不滿足該要求。伊朗授權進口商或代理通常負責準備符合規定的波斯語標籤；出口商須提供準確的技術規格以供翻譯。
